subtitle: Server console
noAccounts: No accounts on this instance yet.
noRecords: No records stored for this account.
enterToken: Enter the admin token and press Connect.
heroTitle: The server can’t read your data.
heroDesc: Everything below is live sync metadata. Master passwords, data keys, host names and credentials never reach the server — only opaque XChaCha20-Poly1305 ciphertext does. Inspect any account to see exactly what a record looks like from here.
whatServerStores: What the server actually stores for
inspNote: The preview is the real first bytes of each blob. Without the dataKey it is irreversible noise — a full database dump reveals only this structure, never content.
footText: The audit log records only the event, account, device and a human-readable summary (counters / cursors) — never content. Purge tombstones only removes deletion markers every device has already synced past, so it can never resurrect a record. Delete account cascades its records, devices and pairing sessions — irreversibly.
nothingPurge: Nothing to purge — no tombstone is past every device cursor yet.
purgeConfirmNote:
?

Only deletion markers every device has already pulled past are removed — this cannot resurrect a record.
deleteConfirmNote:
?

This irreversibly removes its records, devices and pairing sessions. Any client still signed in will lose sync access.
revokeConfirmNote:
?

It stops syncing until it signs in again with the master password.
invitePurgeUsedConfirm: Delete all used invitation codes? This cannot be undone.
invitePurgeExpiredConfirm: Delete all expired invitation codes? This cannot be undone.
